selectedOwner: docs/standards/control-register.json plus tooling/control-policy.ts and HGI-306 feedback trace
decision: Reject the prose-only fix. Promote the repeated freshness invariant into its typed schema and fixtures, retire the skill's weaker field-list reminder, and retain only a pointer to the durable owner.
evidenceRequired: Feedback promotion trace names the prior reminder and promoted owner.
All eight controls have commands, earliest owners, and at least two addressable fixtures.
limitations: Promotion proves ownership and enforcement shape, not future control effectiveness without accepted-outcome review.
nonClaims: Repeated guidance does not prove enforcement or accepted outcomes.
rollbackRevocation: Restore the prior pointer only with the typed owner, tests, and feedback trace kept coherent.
